seoTitle: Brumby vs Brunswick East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Brumby and Brunswick East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Brumby vs Brunswick East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brumby and Brunswick East.
heading: Brumby vs Brunswick East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brumby, Victoria and Brunswick East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brumby has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Brunswick East (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brumby or Brunswick East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brumby has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Brunswick East scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brumby scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Brunswick East scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brumby or Brunswick East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brumby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
